name_cn:
Monogram college
Still popular since its launch, a timeless classic! A street style essential for fashionistas, the top choice for many Hollywood stars! Goes well with any outfit, looks effortless with casual wear, and elegant with formal wear. An absolutely versatile bag for any occasion!
Size: 32X21X8Cm
Model: 392738
